final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    output reg [1:0] count
);

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    if (reset) begin
        count <= 2'b00;
    end else if (enable) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
